title: Knowledge Base
subtitle: Manage your knowledge bases and documents
emptyState: No knowledge bases yet. Create your first one to get started.
deleteKbDescription: This knowledge base and all its documents will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
chunkingImmutableWarning: Chunk settings cannot be changed after creation.
descriptionPlaceholder: A brief description of this knowledge base...
strategyRecursiveDesc: Split by paragraphs, sentences, then words. Best for general use.
strategyMarkdownDesc: Split by # headers first, then recursively within sections. Best for .md files.
strategyFixedDesc: Fixed character-length chunks. Best for unstructured text or logs.
strategySemanticDesc: Split by semantic similarity using embeddings. Best for long documents.
semanticFallbackHint: Semantic chunking primarily splits by meaning. Size/overlap are used as fallback limits.
modeHybridDesc: Vector + full-text search with RRF fusion + reranking. Best quality.
modeDenseDesc: Pure vector similarity search. Good for semantic matching.
modeFtsDesc: Pure keyword search. Good for exact terms, codes, and names.
discardUnsavedDescription: You have unsaved changes. Closing will discard them.
noDocuments: No documents yet. Upload files or create a markdown document to get started.
deleteDocumentDescription: "{filename}" and its vectors will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
dropFilesHint: Drop files here or click to browse
acceptedFormats: PDF · DOCX · MD · HTML · CSV · TXT
urlPlaceholder:
Paste URLs, one per line:
https://docs.example.com
https://blog.example.com/post
urlProviderHint: Web pages are fetched via Jina Reader · PDF / DOCX / XLSX / PPTX downloaded directly
discardPendingFilesDescription: You have {count} file(s) selected but not yet uploaded. Closing will discard them.
discardPendingUrlsDescription: You have URLs entered but not yet imported. Closing will discard them.
discardUnsavedNoteDescription: You have unsaved content. Closing will permanently discard what you've written.
noteContentPlaceholder:
# My Document

Write your content here...
searchPrompt: Enter a query and press Enter to search.
